project_type: React SPA mind map application (single-file App.jsx)
build_system: Vite with React plugin, Tailwind CSS for styling
test_command: No tests exist - verify via build only
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation/bundling errors. Visually inspect code logic for correctness.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Single-file React app (src/App.jsx is ~2982 lines). Uses localStorage for persistence. Uses lucide-react for icons. Uses Tailwind CSS classes for all styling.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns - inline Tailwind CSS, functional components with hooks, localStorage for persistence.
key_patterns: All app state is in the WorkflowApp component. Sidebar is conditionally rendered via `showSidebar` state. The sidebar has sections for Import/Export, View mode toggle, Workspaces list, Task Stats, and Nodes Directory. All persistence uses localStorage with 'premium-' prefix keys. Icons come from lucide-react.
directory_structure: Single src directory with App.jsx (main component), main.jsx (entry point), index.css (Tailwind directives). All application logic is in App.jsx.
